<div class="sphinxpress-doc">
<section id="streaming-api">
<h1>Streaming API</h1>
<section id="overview">
<h2>Overview</h2>
<p>The streaming API provides memory-efficient, incremental processing of text segments. Instead of loading all segments into memory at once, the iterator yields segments one by one in document order.</p>
<p>This is particularly useful for:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>Large documents</strong>: Process multi-gigabyte texts without loading all segments into memory</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Real-time synthesis</strong>: Start TTS processing before all segmentation is complete</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Pipeline integration</strong>: Stream segments through processing stages</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Low-latency applications</strong>: Begin output as soon as first segment is ready</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="iterator-function">
<h2>Iterator Function</h2>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span>

<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
    <span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>The iterator signature matches <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">split_with_offsets()</span></code>:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Iterator</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">]</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="guarantees">
<h2>Guarantees</h2>
<section id="document-order">
<h3>Document Order</h3>
<p>Segments are always yielded in document order (by <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">char_start</span></code>):</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="c1"># Current segment always comes after previous</span>
        <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span>
    <span class="n">segments</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="no-global-state">
<h3>No Global State</h3>
<p>Each iterator is independent with no shared state:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="c1"># Safe to run multiple iterators</span>
<span class="n">iter1</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text1</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">iter2</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text2</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># No interference between iterations</span>
<span class="n">seg1</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">next</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">iter1</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">seg2</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">next</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">iter2</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="same-offsets">
<h3>Same Offsets</h3>
<p>Offset guarantees are identical to <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">split_with_offsets()</span></code>:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
    <span class="c1"># Offsets map exactly to original text</span>
    <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
<section id="usage-examples">
<h2>Usage Examples</h2>
<section id="basic-streaming">
<h3>Basic Streaming</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span>

<span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;First sentence. Second sentence.</span><span class="se">\\</span><span class="s2">n</span><span class="se">\\</span><span class="s2">nNew paragraph.&quot;</span>

<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
    <span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Processing </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="c1"># Process immediately without waiting for all segments</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="real-time-tts-pipeline">
<h3>Real-time TTS Pipeline</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">asyncio</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span>

<span class="k">async</span> <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">synthesize_segment</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Synthesize audio for one segment.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="c1"># Hypothetical TTS call</span>
    <span class="n">audio</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">await</span> <span class="n">tts_engine</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">synthesize</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;segment_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;audio&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">audio</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;position&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>

<span class="k">async</span> <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">stream_synthesis</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Stream synthesis results as soon as each segment is ready.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">await</span> <span class="n">synthesize_segment</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">yield</span> <span class="n">result</span>

<span class="c1"># Usage</span>
<span class="k">async</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">audio_chunk</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">stream_synthesis</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">long_text</span><span class="p">):</span>
    <span class="k">await</span> <span class="n">audio_output</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">write</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">audio_chunk</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="processing-large-files">
<h3>Processing Large Files</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">process_large_book</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">file_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">output_path</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Process a large ebook segment by segment.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">with</span> <span class="nb">open</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">file_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;r&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">encoding</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s1">&#39;utf-8&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">f</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">f</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read</span><span class="p">()</span>

    <span class="k">with</span> <span class="nb">open</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">output_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;w&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">encoding</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s1">&#39;utf-8&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">out</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="c1"># Process one segment at a time</span>
            <span class="n">processed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">process_segment</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="c1"># Write immediately</span>
            <span class="n">out</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">write</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="se">\\</span><span class="s2">t</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">processed</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="se">\\</span><span class="s2">n&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="c1"># Memory is freed after each iteration</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="parallel-processing">
<h3>Parallel Processing</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">concurrent.futures</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">ThreadPoolExecutor</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span>

<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">process_batch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Process a batch of segments.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">results</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">expensive_operation</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">results</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">results</span>

<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">stream_with_batching</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">batch_size</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">10</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Stream segments in batches for parallel processing.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">batch</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">batch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">batch</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="n">batch_size</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">yield</span> <span class="n">batch</span>
            <span class="n">batch</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="c1"># Yield remaining</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">batch</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">yield</span> <span class="n">batch</span>

<span class="c1"># Process batches in parallel</span>
<span class="k">with</span> <span class="n">ThreadPoolExecutor</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">max_workers</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">4</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">executor</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">batch</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">stream_with_batching</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">long_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">batch_size</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">20</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">future</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">executor</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">submit</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">process_batch</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">batch</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">results</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">future</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">result</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="c1"># Handle results...</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="progress-tracking">
<h3>Progress Tracking</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span>

<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">process_with_progress</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Process with progress tracking.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">total_chars</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="c1"># Calculate progress based on character position</span>
        <span class="n">progress</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="n">total_chars</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="mi">100</span>

        <span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Progress: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">progress</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">.1f</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">% - Processing </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Process segment...</span>
        <span class="n">process_segment</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="selective-processing">
<h3>Selective Processing</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">process_matching_segments</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">pattern</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Process only segments matching a pattern.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">re</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">search</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">pattern</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="c1"># Only process matching segments</span>
            <span class="n">result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">expensive_processing</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">yield</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Skip non-matching segments</span>
            <span class="k">yield</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="early-termination">
<h3>Early Termination</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">find_first_mention</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">search_term</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Find first segment containing search term.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">search_term</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Found it - stop iteration</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">segment</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

<span class="c1"># Iterator stops as soon as we return</span>
<span class="n">result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">find_first_mention</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">long_document</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;important phrase&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
<section id="comparison-with-list-version">
<h2>Comparison with List Version</h2>
<section id="when-to-use-iterator">
<h3>When to Use Iterator</h3>
<p>✅ Use <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">iter_split_with_offsets()</span></code> when:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>Processing very large texts (&gt; 1 MB)</p></li>
<li><p>Need to start output before all segmentation is done</p></li>
<li><p>Building real-time pipelines</p></li>
<li><p>Memory is constrained</p></li>
<li><p>Can process segments independently</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="when-to-use-list">
<h3>When to Use List</h3>
<p>✅ Use <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">split_with_offsets()</span></code> when:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>Need random access to segments</p></li>
<li><p>Need total segment count upfront</p></li>
<li><p>Performing multiple passes over segments</p></li>
<li><p>Text size is small (&lt; 1 MB)</p></li>
<li><p>Need to sort or filter all segments</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
</section>
<section id="performance-characteristics">
<h2>Performance Characteristics</h2>
<section id="memory-usage">
<h3>Memory Usage</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="c1"># List version - loads all segments into memory</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">huge_text</span><span class="p">)</span>  <span class="c1"># Uses O(n) memory</span>

<span class="c1"># Iterator version - one segment at a time</span>
<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">huge_text</span><span class="p">):</span>  <span class="c1"># Uses O(1) memory</span>
    <span class="n">process</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="time-to-first-segment">
<h3>Time to First Segment</h3>
<p>The iterator has the same time-to-first-segment as the list version since the current implementation processes all segments upfront. A future optimization could make this truly streaming.</p>
<div class="admonition note">
<p class="admonition-title">Note</p>
<p>Current implementation note: The iterator currently uses <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">split_with_offsets()</span></code> internally and yields from the result. A future version may implement true streaming for faster time-to-first-segment.</p>
</div>
</section>
<section id="overhead">
<h3>Overhead</h3>
<p>Iterator overhead is minimal:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="c1"># List conversion</span>
<span class="n">segments_list</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">))</span>

<span class="c1"># Equivalent to</span>
<span class="n">segments_list</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
<section id="best-practices">
<h2>Best Practices</h2>
<ol class="arabic">
<li><p><strong>Process Immediately</strong></p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="c1"># Good - process each segment as it arrives</span>
<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
    <span class="n">result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">process</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">save</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">result</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Bad - defeats purpose of streaming</span>
<span class="n">all_segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">))</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</li>
<li><p><strong>Use with Context Managers</strong></p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="k">with</span> <span class="nb">open</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;output.txt&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;w&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">f</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">processed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">process</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">f</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">write</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">processed</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="se">\\</span><span class="s2">n&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</li>
<li><p><strong>Combine with Generators</strong></p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">processed_segments</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Generator pipeline.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">should_process</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">yield</span> <span class="n">process</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Chain generators</span>
<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">result</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">processed_segments</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
    <span class="n">output</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">result</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</li>
</ol>
</section>
<section id="see-also">
<h2>See Also</h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><a class="reference internal" href="../offsets/"><span class="doc">Offset-Preserving Segmentation</span></a> - Offset coordinate system and guarantees</p></li>
<li><p><a class="reference internal" href="../api/"><span class="doc">API Reference</span></a> - Complete API reference</p></li>
<li><p><a class="reference internal" href="../examples/"><span class="doc">Examples</span></a> - More usage examples</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
</section>
</div>
{% endraw %}
